Best Luxury Hotels in Athens

Compare premium Athens hotels by area, star category, price signal, Acropolis view, rooftop bar, pool, and traveler fit.

Quick answer

For classic luxury, start with Syntagma. For historic luxury, compare Plaka. For polished neighborhood luxury, compare Kolonaki.

This guide uses visible hotel signals, not unsupported awards. It is strongest for deciding which luxury lane fits the trip before comparing live rates.

Compare hotels How to choose Booking checks FAQs

How to Choose

Classic landmark luxury

Hotel Grande Bretagne, King George Athens, and NJV Athens Plaza anchor Syntagma luxury in this dataset.

Historic luxury

Electra Palace Athens is the premium Plaka starting point when Acropolis access and old-city atmosphere matter.

Quiet polish

St. George Lycabettus and Periscope Hotel make Kolonaki worth comparing for a less touristy luxury base.

Area Fit for This Search

Plaka

Charming pedestrian streets beneath the Acropolis with neoclassical architecture, traditional tavernas, and ancient ruins around every corner. The oldest neighborhood in Athens.

Best for
First-timers, Couples, History buffs
Price signal
from €280
Acropolis
5-10 min
Signals
1 view / 1 rooftop

Syntagma

Athens' main square, home to the Parliament building and changing of the guard. Excellent metro connections and upscale shopping on Ermou Street.

Best for
Business travelers, Luxury seekers, First-timers
Price signal
from €220
Acropolis
12-15 min
Signals
3 view / 2 rooftop

Kolonaki

Athens' most fashionable neighborhood with designer boutiques, art galleries, and sophisticated cafes. At the foot of Lycabettus Hill.

Best for
Luxury travelers, Shoppers, Art lovers
Price signal
from €250
Acropolis
15-20 min
Signals
1 view / 1 rooftop

Psyrri

Former industrial area transformed into Athens' creative hub. Street art, indie bars, live music venues, and eclectic restaurants.

Best for
Young travelers, Nightlife lovers, Creatives
Price signal
from €200
Acropolis
10-15 min
Signals
0 view / 1 rooftop

Source and Selection Notes

Hotels are included when their Hotels of Athens fields match this page’s criteria. The page does not use unsupported review scores or invented live availability. Treat prices as directional signals and confirm live rates, room type, cancellation terms, access rules, and views before booking.

Plaka hotelsSyntagma hotelsKolonaki hotelsPsyrri hotels

Booking Checks That Actually Matter

Use these checks before treating any hotel-level signal as a finished booking decision.

✓

Confirm the exact room type, not only the hotel-level feature.

✓

Check whether breakfast, taxes, cancellation, and city fees change the final value.

✓

Verify the walking route or transfer time for the specific address.

✓

If a view, rooftop, pool, or ferry connection matters, confirm the access rules for your dates.

FAQs: Best Luxury Hotels in Athens

What is the best luxury area in Athens?

Syntagma has the strongest classic luxury cluster, while Plaka and Kolonaki suit different premium trip styles.

Are luxury hotels in Athens near the Acropolis?

Some are, especially in Plaka and Syntagma, but Kolonaki and Riviera-style stays can trade proximity for setting.

Should I choose a 5-star or boutique luxury hotel?

Choose 5-star for service infrastructure and amenities; choose boutique luxury for scale, design, and neighborhood feel.
